name: Korean Data MCP
description: Real-time Korean web data for AI assistants — Naver reviews, Melon chart, Daangn/Bunjang marketplace, Korean news, Musinsa fashion rankings. Powered by Apify actors.

tools.name: get_naver_place_reviews
tools.description: Fetch reviews for any Naver Place listing

tools.name: get_melon_chart
tools.description: Real-time and historical Korean music chart data from Melon

tools.name: search_naver_news
tools.description: Search Korean news articles from Naver News

tools.name: search_naver_places
tools.description: Search places on Naver Map by keyword and location

tools.name: get_musinsa_ranking
tools.description: Fetch Musinsa fashion product rankings by category

env.name: APIFY_TOKEN
env.description: Apify API token — get yours free at https://console.apify.com/account/integrations
